title: Agent recalls a restored memory after local backup restore

turns.name: ask-restored-recall-phrase
turns.text: Before this restore, I gave you a backup recall phrase. What exact three-word phrase did I ask you to remember? Reply with only that phrase.
failedAssertions: responseIncludesAll: expected response to include all of [silver,comet,orchid], missing [silver,comet,orchid], saw ""

finalChecks.label: actionCalled
finalChecks.detail: expected 1 call(s) to REPLY, saw 0. Called: (none)
